title: Hot weather forecast for tomorrow, Tuesday 4 February
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest information from the South African Weather Serivce, very hot and uncomfortable weather conditions are expected in places over the interior of Namakwa District in the Northern Cape today.


> The heat wave is also expected over the Cape Winelands and the Central Karoo, and the Little Karoo tomorrow, Tuesday 4 February.


Daytime temperatures between 35 and 41 ยฐC can be expected.

Such weather conditions can have significant health impacts, and so it is essential to take necessary precautions.


> Expected maximum temperatures this week:


MondayTuesdayWednesdayThursdayGeorge22ยฐC23ยฐC21ยฐC21ยฐCKnysna26ยฐC28ยฐC25ยฐC23ยฐCMossel Bay23ยฐC25ยฐC23ยฐC22ยฐCOudtshoorn32ยฐC38ยฐC29ยฐC26ยฐCRiversdale27ยฐC30ยฐC23ยฐC22ยฐCGraaff-Reinet33ยฐC 38ยฐC28ยฐC24ยฐC
